segments.text: It's very nice to see all of you here, so many
from Australia. To worship Shiva Sadashiva I think this is a
Very important occasion it' s important because
SadaShiva the God Almighty who is one
Is expressed on your heart as Spirit the Shiva
We have to understand that so many people came on this earth at different times, in
the countries and they talked with different peoples about righteousness – that is dharma
– how you can elevate yourself.
And all of them said we had to be reborn!
That means one has become the spirit.
They have all said the same thing because they knew without attention is filled with
a light of Spirit, you will not be able to understand spirituality.
You had this spirit within which are in a witness state.
Why all the religions have failed, because they did not get their Self-realization.
They didn't become a spirit so there's this tremendous difference between you and
others who profess some religion it looks as if that hypocrites they intellectualize
as you know, they explain it very well but can see very clearly that the haven't absorbed
spirituality. That absorption was impossible without Self-realization! This everybody felt
Buddha went to this limit and Mahavira both –to say forget about God, Forget About God
Almighty, you just get yourself – your self-realization.
So they are called as atheists and irriksharwadi—they don't believe in Ishvara but
They felt that the way people were talking about God Almighty
And what these books have said
These books also speak of righteousness
Except some books there has been some sort
interference, but most of them speak of spirituality and what you have to achieve.
What is the purpose for religion?
All that spoken very well written very well they'll tell
You-You Have To Be This-You Have To Be That
this Is Not Good-that's not good
So even first step where the Dharma has
be established, was not established where people are supposed to cheat each other.
There has been justice there had to be collectivity and understanding no jealousy or hypocrisy
were it's a different race ,a different community we can call as a different civilization is
be created.
Everybody claims that they are the chosen ones, but They're just same there's a tremendous
achievement of Sahaja Yogis and they have achieved this state or spirit so now you
can absorb dharma without any difficulties You would not like to cheat anyone
You'd not like to kill anyone, you would not be violent with anybody.
We will stick on the truth – very few people can stick onto it then we are not people who
are going rob others and have no intention at all don't come into your mind that you
to take away things from others, first of all which is the most important thing that you
have a rapport with God Almighty. That You are in way in awe about God – there
Is awe not I would say fear because fear it's all dispelled just no more fear for
But you have awe for God, that is God Almighty.
You won't cheat people –
—you wont' cheat Sahaja Yoga—for money
or fight over power
Or something material
All your attention will be towards
the expansion of your awareness
in light from Spirit
This is a vision
of your Mother, because Shiva is just a witness.
Sadashiva is just witnessing all this play
he doesn't have any visions about it
but now you must lots of hopes after seeing
the kind people that are created out of Sahaja Yoga
very unique
beautiful
wonderful angel like people having been created
Now only problem
is that you have to keep to your angelic foundations.
But I find, sometimes it happens – doesn't matter!
That You fall and falter again you rise into Your awareness
And try locate the new dimensions
that are available to you, that You can find out.
All this is possible because now
we belong really
To the chosen ones race
We must know also
That you're very special people
It's not realized sometimes by Sahaja Yogis
They have no self-esteem
As what they've got
Once you had self esteem
You will have the wisdom to understand what is your role in this lifetime.
This self-esteem, it's only possible if you see other people
who are lost
into the mire of nonsense
Now ,you're a special community I said
.You' re one that
going create
Now whatever are the dharma's points or we can say dharma aspects, you can imbibe them
sahaja.
Sahaj has a very special meaning spontaneously – You do not have to exert ,You don't
have to go into a penance or work it out, in the sahaj way you can do.
Sahaja also means easy – then having your heart all these qualities without any difficulty
whatsoever.
It's easiest thing for You be righteous than otherwise and easier if you are honest
So this speciality that you have got is the vision of all the saints,
Of All The Prophets
Of All The Seers
Of All The Incarnations
Is You.
There are lectures and lectures people give
–you must do like these-
They think by educating
People into these principles
People will be alright
they cannot
If try to educate them
It'll go away
as an ego into their heads.
Because you get educated only through your ego is not sahaj, it's not sahaja sustenance
– sahaja dharanaa . It something that put on to from outside but for
You know, it is very easy that you can imbibe all the aspects of dharma – very easily.
Don't have to do anything!
We'll not just do It.
I've known people who used take drugs or use abuse people beat and this one fellow
he said he used to carry a revolver always with him has become such quiet silent beautiful
person, that unbelievable but his wife tells me he was like this.
So now you are the special people and those who have not got their realization cannot
get to Dharma easily then a second point which is very easy for
you is to love another person,
To care for other persons.
It's very easy here
You would like do that
.You will have to care
For people who are Sahaja Yogis
Also non-Sahajyogis
Sahaja Yoga quite flexible
If see somebody
Who a non sahaja yogi
And also suffering
you would immediately jump to see that person gets help from him.
I've seen people in Sahaja Yoga, very interesting they are!
One gentleman came and said,
Mother i have no money ,I want go
And do some work for sahaja yoga
But even if I don't have any money
For the household
That's all right
That is good
You come tomorrow
I'll give you the money."
Next day he never came.
I said, what's a matter?
He said there was somebody sitting with You that time when i was talking to if you remember
and then I don't remember so clearly all right
.I also do not know him as soon
As they went out
,he says how much
Money Do you want
? I told
Him at least this much
Immediately
He took out
The money
And gave it
So who haven got something
In Sahaja Yoga
Who hasn' t got money
Immediately we run to help that person, like you'll be amazed at there are these six
countries – like Romania, Bulgaria Russia Poland, Czechoslovakia.
All this country even Hungary have been helped by one country or other and the East Asian
countries are helped by Australians.
I never told them,
i never asked
and they were said that you have to help
They just came forward
That Mother
somehow we had to help
We'll arrange
will get through there
Will manage this
Will do it
It's very surprising
How could
Just
Think of
Helping those countries
Then
The made
Tickets for them
They brought them to India, they looked after.
Russians came into India and we had looked after
Everybody was so full of compassion
And love but without feeling
that have done anything
Without felling in any way
That there has been an obligation
To somebody
Nobody expected
Them to thank
Then write letters
Of thanks or
Anything
Whatever is done
Is finished now
That's
nobody ever asked
How much money
Was given
how much was spent
how much we had to give, nothing of the kind.
At that spur-of moment everybody come forward
they gave them money and everything worked out
It's very surprising
For example France
France is looking after Romania
I didn't know there are done so many work in Romania
I reached Hungary
And suddenly find 125 Romanians
My heart was really filled with such joy
I said, how are you here?
French have arranged everything for us Mother.
Really!
There were no French people there –
No one from France and Romanians
Were singing so well that the Indians felt
That oh wow what is this a new group has started
All of them
And they never used books without using
The book's they was seeing these Romanian
So i say where we going to stay in night
We'll staying garden mother it alright
But I said, how?
We'll stay there.
Doesn't matter!
How secretly they helped – if had not asked them
would have known that
So this to help the people who do
You can call those who are poorer than us
I've seen also
individually
They look after others
and bring things
for their friends
presents
and beautiful things just for their own satisfaction, not to oblige anyone or later on say I brought
this sari you nothing. Just see that sorry in another way it's such a beautiful thing
imagine these countries like England France Spain Italy Switzerland very aggressive very
help anyone, but to establish their empire or destroy people and convert them in the name
of religion.
In God's name!
But when you go into other countries just want your help – give all that is needed
for it?
I am myself amazed how this works out so spontaneously within our hearts that we should
do these things and work on them.
This transformation that has taken place within you,
Has brought out all the beauty of your heart
Of compassion and love.
And You want to give security
Without expecting anything
without demanding it
Then we will enjoy doing this
Living in a simple place like these
under a tent sitting listening me
We don't want any comfort
Just seek the comfort of your spirit and enjoy
whole place, nature.
Gradually I have seen also Sahaja Yogis are becoming extremely conscious
about ecological problem all over world
They started using things which is natural
which artistic
It's something so surprising that suddenly they
taken to artistically
I know of a gentleman who had arms, ammunitions in his house or everything like that.
But now he has beautiful things – off course the arms and ammunition are one side but
such beautifully artistic thing is collected so i said how did you get this?
See Mother was thinking if You would want to see them then they will feel happy
So I have bought for you to see, and if want can take anything.
And said,"I don't want any thing."
You keep it yourself so this generosity we call it Audhari is a sign of an incarnation
but these generosities among my own children now they are extremely generous
They enjoy giving things other than keeping them themselves
It has happened not only in Australia
It has happened all over the world.
If you see, Sahaja Yogis how they are sacrificing their time and money to spread Sahaj Yoga
–to help others-and accommodate all kinds of things…all kind's people within themselves.
Such wisdom such collective wisdom is there we don't have take any concessions.
You don't have to say that you all must this or what is your opinion, will vote for it.
Everyone votes the same way if somebody says alright we need some help in Bulgaria and
Italy.
Immediately all Italians brought out their ornaments everything like Mother how much
And the Bulgarians are surprised also that what have we done for these Italians,
That they should come down all way to help us out with money every kind of thing.
So this compassion ,this love and feeling of oneness as if
They're part & parcel from Us
We aren't separate
For Russia you'll be surprised
that they sent a television from America.
Now, America had nothing to do with Russia
but must be the Spirit of Shri Krishna
trying help the spirit
Of Right Agnya
Must Be!
Such enthusiasm about Russia
Unbelievable
They came in buses
Came on trains
Went all way
to all these places, to far-fetched places and they have achieved tremendous results.
It's not only in Europe that working around their own cities but also the way
there are workings in Turkey then working in Nepal
And now somebody has gone Japan
He is actually not a Japanese
He is from Rio and he has gone to Japan, who's a physicist.
But she using some sort of pantomime show on the streets
To attract people telling them about Sahaja Yoga
He telephoned me three four times
Mother you have been in Australia so many time
Why don't come to Japan this time?
I said all right next time I will definitely come to Japan
I promised him, but this time am already programmed you see by Sahaja Yogis so can't help it.
They have fixed me up everywhere and i don´t mind because its such to meet come such many
people ask Me whether You are travelling so much they say that I never think about also
the collectivity now is tremendous . Its not only in Australia we have the collectivity
But the other day I telephoned to someone in India and told them,
''I'm buying an ashram in Brisbane.''
They said, ''Mother it's a very great thing.
We're very happy now for Indian.
What is there if we buy an Ashrama in Brisbane?''
So overjoyed about It!
To Them Brisbane Is The Same
as Bombay or Delhi.
Heart has become so large
because Shiva Shining There, this Spirit is shining
It has become such a large heart that it encompasses the whole universe, I think.
The way people look at is why you all have became universal People!
You don't only read about Vishva Nirmal Dharma –you do not know of it through your
mind and try to follow but you have imbibed with it which is so sahaj that you are
aware of it, how in a such way It has come to you.
Now You know Australia was full of Rishalism once upon time nobody was allowed
coming here – might be fifty years back also but today
In Australia what change is this?
Though they talked about Christianity and all those things
But They didn't think What Christ had said
There were just opposite of what Christianity should
Islam is the same, Islam talks of very great things but it has to be confessed that Muslims
have nothing with Islam. Is absolutely from outside if you seek Christianity
You will see a funny idea about it If ask any Hindu gentleman about Christianity
They would say they are worst possible people Very cunning, very aggressive and they take
It takes them no time to kill each other, imagine, disciples of Christ.
But if you ask a Christian about Muslim he will tell
You oh these Muslims are the most quarrelsome dirtiest people ever born, fundamentalist
they're all fundamentalists whether it's Hindu, Christian or Muslim anyone
They' re fundamentalists because
They are reading one book and that too just reading, the book also doesn't go.
If a book goes inside they will realize all these books telling same thing under different
names –that's it!
But then universal things you have got thanks to your spirit which was there quite intact
and which has started shining with it.
So we have now a new community,
A New Civilization of people
who are extremely honest to themselves
Honest To each other
They Are Extremely Righteous
And Good People
they're absolutely non-violent
Absolutely law abiding
Very loving Affectionate
At the same time, extremely constructive and at
The Same Time very intelligent
They understand Sahaja Yoga. It's such a subtle subject
Sahajyoga is Such A Subtle Subject
Because you know everybody has failed to make people Understand
Anything about truth it's impossible situation but this was the trick your spirit
Once your spirit is enlightened it goes into head without any difficulties, absolutely Sahaja
Yoga.
You don't know how difficult this subject of Sahajyoga has become!
It's such a fulfilment for the desire to be divine that Your divinity can now express
itself.
When you are collective then more enjoying each other and enjoy collective life.
Individualism is against the Spirit of The Whole, but we have our own varieties.
Where you live in other countries and other atmospheres with other traditions that's
how are living among ourselves?
We had same faith which is enlightened – which not blind faith, enlightened faith firstly
that you are realized souls, secondly that there is an All-Pervading Power.
We have the same type of worship – whether it's Christ or whether it's Mohammed Sahab
and whether It' s Shiva we all worshipped in a similar way
but do not have any sort difference of opinion like one church becoming ten churches
one Hinduism becoming ten Hinduisms. It's not like that, we are all Sahaja Yogis and
We have got the same principle binding us in a sahaj manner
You don't say oh! you've to be principled
We're on this principle, we're Sahaja Yogis
You have to be there absolutely because you just can't help it,
Because in your nature now the spirit is shining.
Also
are becoming archetypes I should say
In a real sense of word
for people who arenot such
Such people
Are not available anywhere
When people will see you, they'll think that what a model it is – what a model of life.
They don't drink ,they dont smoke .They don' t boast offit ,they don''t hate anyone
…..they love any one…
..they are so dynamic
...they're creative
.......they´re so constructive
...they ´re self-contented
...they not at all competitive
They cause no problem to nature, they cause not problems with anything.
There have become such beautiful people – who are these people?
Such Beautiful People Are The Models!
So now individually you've got understand this part that we had be models in the country
of Australia.
Model, good behavior and language – decent life, decorous life not fighting with husband
or wife you see open any television just get a headache I mean there is no other theme
but the husband-fighting-wife and wife-fighting-husband.
There should be wisdom about it!
Fighting among yourselves…
You see, if so many people have gathered in a pub what will happen that the pub will burst
out.
They can never sit silently!
The mayor of Kavaila told me – it surprises Me–that at church we are sitting for half
an hour and then you start nudging each other about how long is going to take now
or better get up?
We'll be tired…and What these people doing together with you for hours?
How they're so spellbound?!
They don't feel tired.
I think they are special people."
And said, "'They're.'
But what do you say to them?
They didn' t know anything.
They were just enjoying it."
He couldn''t understand that once we had a puja
or guru-puja for about six hours altogether
and there was surprise at how these
people are sitting
all the villages
mostly their elderly
They thought that these angels have come from somewhere, they are angelic people.
They don't trouble you ,they dont tortureyou .They look after you and try to be kindto
You not onlythat but theytry to bring joy too.
The were so surprised in the village first they used call Me princess then they started
calling Me Goddess, then they said You are Madonna.
Whatever They could think of the best, They started saying all those things."
The want now to come to Sahaja Yoga but I say let us see after some time we will work
it out for them also!
There so nice by seeing how the sahaj yogis because I seldom go up but seen the way
Sahaja Yogis are, that the land behind a house was not even given to Prince Duryodhana who
is willing pay lot of money because he wanted have road that way.
But me they rushed forward and at very nominal price gave Me
That land said it's for you only please
Have It.
The whole village getting into transformation but
The dedication you have is very remarkable, surprises Me – really surprises Me.
I've never taught too much but the way You are dedicated in everything everyone who's
not a Sahaja Yogi will be charmed by how You're dedicated to Sahaj Yoga and me!
Sometimes i think what am done?
I've done nothing.
You had your Kundalini, you had Your Spirit – that's all!
Such a difference with little distance you covered and such a different…
Can we imagine an Indian woman coming to Australia finding this love?
This affection or dis-dedication unbelievable they are thinking that I must be mesmerizing
her.
Nobody can believe that you could be that dedicated, take so much trouble.
So much care! I mean just imagine the flowers
That You have brought here
Just Imagine all this you've done
And just imagine
The way they bought another big car
To bring your mother without any difficulty
All these love
This affection
This Care
i never asked for anything
If we had said to walk
I would have walked, never said no.
But the way you want to express your love for Me this dedication is so much and You
sacrifice such a lot of time really You are sacrificing quite a bit Your effort come all
way to this far-off place for these puja.
All the gain that you have from Puja is only possible when You are a Realized One, otherwise
it's useless – do any Pooja or worship people go into church sing few hymns and come
back they're just same then afterwards going in pub because there think pubs can be the
One has to sacrifice, though I may say that Sahaja Yoga is the easiest thing.
You don't have go to Himalayas and stand on your heads
but still you've got to sacrifice
Your time
Your attention
Formally
We might be going
To some rock music
Might we are going
Some pubs also
Might enjoying all these things
But you're given up everything
Without My telling
you just have given up and are so pure now. Your attention is so pure, You can't enjoy
all these things! Don' tYou think it's very remarkable that this has happened? This community
I don''t need to tell you or educate –I must say-that with everything you've given
up, suddenly I find all of you have become so clean.
So beautiful your chakras –so-clean is it that these are your puro purnias?
That's working out but still i would say we must know our self esteem
and how can behave like this if
Now you are a Sahaja Yogi, so that dignity and wisdom has to be there.
The compassion the love unity of purpose should have been there
All over this world we've brothers & sisters
This brotherhood is everywhere
You're rocky sister
Your very pure relationships
Anything impure it's just thrown out in a sahaj manner
Those who do not fit into it, just get out of here.
We have now very beautiful families –
Very Beautiful Children
It's… Just think off it!
Moses saved some Jews but what are they good for?
Nothing was the use saving such people
Then Christ came and talked about this
And This is What has happened to Christianity
Mohammed came and talked of very nice things, I must tell you.
He never made it a rigid religion –never!
It was very flexible
And he said that we should get the knowledge
So according to them
Knowledge is about reading the book
and interpreting it
and being intellectual
After that came Guru Nanaka also
You know what has happened to Sikhs
where they have gone
Sikh means person who has learned
learnt the divine laws
If I say you have to follow the divine laws, how?
You are not connected.
We don't know what our divine law is all about – just following, we want
To follow Divine Laws!
Now if your hanging somewhere on this earth and
The Divine Law's working there
How will work out the Divine Law
When you're not connected
But immediately you'll know what Divine Law
Is
You are going against it.
As soon as you go againsit,you know that can feel on your central nervous system .You
Can Feel It On Your Hands That You Are Doing Something Against The Divine Loss .Immediately
You Know And If You Are Alert ,Immediatly Try To Change .You Think That's Not Correct
This Is the Truth About Myself .You Start Judging Yourself All The Time and You
want to put yourself right, because you don't like it that way.
So many ideas You have about Your personal life – ah!
That is either should be a wife who should spoil Me or husband would spoil me my child
could be this and all finished now what do I want?
I want a real Sahaja Yogini, I want the real Sahaj Yogi to marry and after that marriage
becomes blessing.
How?
These flowers have come out – it's all innately built within you this beauty just
starts showing but has sprouted up these penance so called is no penance they say
I mean, it's a place for penance only the way things are here – there're not even
closed bathrooms. People were finding rather difficult to take a bath in them! It is quite
a penance to come such far-fetched places or travel in Maharashtra as another big penance
but you enjoy it and when we were missing they said that our busses are missing.
I said, really?
You would be happy.
No no Mother we are missing you!
It was an adventure for them they liked the way that they were jostled and giving hiccups
very happy about it all this is like a kind of adventure everything which
We call as tapasya or penance becomes an adventure
And The Way They Describe Is Very Interesting Like these Musicians
they went to Russia and got lost.
And when They came back, then were describing the whole thing with such description as if
God was just taking them from places-to-places – how they where helped every moment?
How they come into Italy sudden or Milan to the Ashram…
The whole description is tremendous!
Now think of what you have achieved but You can't even think.
You just achieve without thinking you achieved things is the blessing of your spirit
Blessing of Shiva. The Spirit Is the witness and
And you develop that witness state to you
All this looks like a funny stage where people are doing these in their politics economics
You see as something absent. I went down to Russia there were so many Russians
And told them that this very bad shape the politics is here now
and you are having
Very, bad times with your food no mother they have
No problem
With Food or anything but what do we care? We've got the spiritual food
Let these people fight through whatever we're not bothered
They were least bothered as There was a coup
Let them fight, let them do what they like.
We are in a different situation."
I said," Which situation you're on?"
They told me we were in the Kingdom of God!
Why should be worry about these kingdoms and things?
Such contented people so very beautiful
You have many brothers & sisters there
Early morning i got up
And they had, I don't know when, planted flowers on the road of My house there.
Flowers all along – rose after rose!
I didn' t know where did it came and disappeared.
So sweet I told them except for crying with joy
—I dint now what to say.
If this happens all over
whatever world we can have
There are off course some people who were exceptional
who are troublesome, who not alright. It's all right – forget about them! So now you
have the people that understood what is God? What Sadashiva? Now we've faith in Him which
He has not blinded us and also know His powers work, that His laws works. All other laws
are useless, only His laws works.
You have seen experienced in your lifetime how miracles taking place –how things working
out?
A simple miracle I would say it was desired that Shiv Poojas should be around some hills
but they couldn't arrange them were trying for other places which could not be arranged
so you're here!
You desire and it works, as if your desires acts.
But we have some people who are still mediocre
–who're behaving in a mediocre manner– very dull
Some of them were very dull
They cannot understand such
they don't know how much can gain out
So you shouldn' worry about that
Then think
About the whole collective which is good
And one or two useless people
Forget about them. If they come up well and good, if
They don't come out we are not going to force that
We'll be getting more And More People more and more people I'm sure it will happen
But the greatest thing you have got is The complete integration
Within your being
Your heart
You mind
your
Liver I should say or attention Are all integrated
There's no quarrel
There's no struggle between your heart and mind,
Heart & brain.
Whatever you're brain thinks
Your heart accepts
whatever is in the heart wants
You are brain accepts
What ever attention
Is there
It completely integrated
With your heart
And with your brain
You must see other people
They don't want to do something
But they have to do it because their habituated.
So many people told Me, we want give up this but can't!
Once you've got the spirit then get that power and surpass all those temptations not
only temptations also the differentiation's which always make this is there or like that
But you integrate, you integrate among yourselves.
You integrate amongst different states and you integrate between countries the whole
cosmos seems to be integrated woven and governed by divine laws this integration gives
you a complete understanding of Sahaja Yoga – mentally, emotionally and spiritually.
It's not by some sort brainwashing or bombarding but just through the light
spirit we have seen that truth and understood it also so many powers do
You do not want to exert, that's a different point of the word but just try.
One Word-of-Prayer from you is very powerful than hundreds or prayers for these people one
asking it much more power then thousands of this askings .You have never tried
Try that.
You are extremely powerful, whatever you desire works out."
Your have other powers of giving realization also curing your so many powers but most
the time will bring somebody to Me and be cured no-no there is not need we've given
all power's use them don't afraid used these powers and you'd amazed how this
power work out and how you become more embedded in your faith, yourself.
Of course there are Sahaja Yogis who are made to sit on the throne but still they're begging
what can You do about it?
We all so very powerful – in collective also individually whatever we want I am desireless
Because the Divine, the divine power is working for me everything.
I don't have to desire it no soo.
i dont' desire anything but you've got to desire
You're going pray
and ask
And wider your become your prayers will be wider
For a wide world
Wider vision
Not limited children not limited family
Not limited one place
But unlimited areas
So, we become very conscious and alert about whatever is happening in the world to put our
attention there.
We try find out what's wrong with this or that?
You are not just worried of a small little ashram but you're worried for whole
word finding it was wrong – What can be do?
Because if we have the power and can operate the Divine Power, then why not work it out
ourselves?
We can.
So your attention go to any place – it goes to Nicaragua or Israel or Saddam Hussein
…anyplace that you want to work is out…it moves its mobile universe just start expanding
your heart, your mind and you attention.
Your faith in Me I must say is great
– am myself surprised at that!
Am quite a camouflage
it's not easy to understand me
…I don't'understand Myself
On one side of course
I'm Divine, on the other
Side iam very human
even if film if see somebody suffering
start crying
can't bear
I can't cure children because i cant see their sufferings, it's another aspect of
mine.
Have made myself extremely human and this divinity also is just such ,I've done nothing
having like these or not achieved anything if have achieved anything its understanding
of human beings, because I always felt that all these incarnations and all this prophets
never understood the human being.
They've ever knew they are not enlightened people – no use talking to them about these
great things!
It's a waste… it is like blind person you explain him with colors and beauty at
And so this, the human realization I showed that I had is
